seoTitle: Balaklava vs Bald Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Balaklava and Bald Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Balaklava vs Bald Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Balaklava and Bald Hills.
heading: Balaklava vs Bald Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Balaklava, South Australia and Bald Hills, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Balaklava has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bald Hills (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Balaklava or Bald Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Balaklava has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Bald Hills scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Balaklava scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Bald Hills scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Balaklava or Bald Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Balaklava has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
